00000000000000000000100000100000
00100000000001000000000000001010
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000001000000100000
00000000000000000010100000100000
00010000001001000000000000010111
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
10001100010000110000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00100000011000111111111111111110
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
10101100010000110000000000000000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000101000110010100000100000
00100000010000100000000000000001
00100000001000010000000000000001
00001000000000000000000000000101
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
00000000000000000000000000100000
10101100000001010000000000001010
STOP
00000000000000000000000000000001
00000000000000000000000000000010
00000000000000000000000000000011
00000000000000000000000000000100
00000000000000000000000000000101
00000000000000000000000000000110
00000000000000000000000000000111
00000000000000000000000000001000
00000000000000000000000000001001
00000000000000000000000000001010
STOP
00: ADD $1, $0, $0
01: ADDI $4, $0, 10
02: NOOP
03: ADD $2, $0, $0
04: ADD $5, $0, $0
05: BEQ $1, $4, 23
06: NOOP
07: NOOP
08: NOOP
09: LW $3, 0($2)
10: NOOP
11: NOOP
12: NOOP
13: ADDI $3, $3, -2
14: NOOP
15: NOOP
16: NOOP
17: SW $3, 0($2)
18: NOOP
19: NOOP
20: NOOP
21: ADD $5, $5, $3
22: ADDI $2, $2, 1
23: ADDI $1, $1, 1
24: J 5
25: NOOP
26: NOOP
27: NOOP
28: SW $5, 10($0)
STOP

Acest set de instructiuni parcurge un sir de 10 numere, scade cate 2 din fiecare element, 
stocheaza valorile inapoi in memorie si calculeaza suma tuturor elementelor dupa scadere, 
rezultatul fiind stocat la adresa 10.

B"000000_00000_00000_00001_00000_100000",--  00: ADD $1, $0, $0   ; initializeaza $1 = 0
B"001000_00000_00100_0000000000001010",  --  01: ADDI $4, $0, 10  ; $4 = 10
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  02: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_00010_00000_100000",--  03: ADD $2, $0, $0   ; $2 = 0
B"000000_00000_00000_00101_00000_100000",--  04: ADD $5, $0, $0   ; $5 = 0
B"000100_00001_00100_0000000000010111",  --  05: BEQ $1, $4, 23   ; dac? $1 == $4, sari la instructiunea 28
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  06: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  07: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  08: NOOP
B"100011_00010_00011_0000000000000000",  --  09: LW $3, 0($2)     ; incarca din memorie
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  10: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  11: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  12: NOOP
B"001000_00011_00011_1111111111111110",  --  13: ADDI $3, $3, -2  ; scade 2 din $3
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  14: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  15: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  16: NOOP
B"101011_00010_00011_0000000000000000",  --  17: SW $3, 0($2)     ; stocheaz? înapoi in memorie
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  18: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  19: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  20: NOOP
B"000000_00101_00011_00101_00000_100000",--  21: ADD $5, $5, $3   ; aduna $3 la $5
B"001000_00010_00010_0000000000000100",  --  22: ADDI $2, $2, 1   ; incrementeaza $2 cu 1
B"001000_00001_00001_0000000000000001",  --  23: ADDI $1, $1, 1   ; incrementeaza $1
B"000010_00000000000000000000000101",    --  24: J 5              ; sari la instruc?iunea 4
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  25: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  26: NOOP
B"000000_00000_00000_0000000000100000",  --  27: NOOP
B"101011_00000_00101_0000000000001010",  --  28: SW $5, 10($0)    ; stocheaza rezultatul in memorie
